headline: DB cautious on cruise stocks as fundamentals “not as clear as bulls believe”
summary: Investing.com -- Deutsche Bank maintained Hold ratings across its cruise line coverage, pushing back on bullish expectations ahead of second-quarter earnings and arguing the sector's outlook is "perhaps not as clear as bulls believe it to be."
